fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontPaletteOverride` specifies a single color override for a color palette. Set
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Index> to the zero-based slot in the palette to override,
and set <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Color> to the replacement color in ARGB order
(same format as <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor>).

Use a `ReadOnlySpan<SKFontPaletteOverride>` with
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.PaletteOverrides> to apply overrides when creating a typeface.
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a single color override for a specific slot in a font color palette.

fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> in the same ARGB format as <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor" /> (<c>0xAARRGGBB</c>).
fields.summary: Gets or sets the replacement color as a packed ARGB value.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Index" /> and <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride.Color" /> are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> is equal to the current instance.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified object is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> with equal field values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> instance.

params.obj: The object to compare with the current instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns a hash code for the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> instance.

fields.value: The zero-based index of the color slot within the active palette.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the palette color slot to override.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if both values have equal index and color; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> values are equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride left, SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride right);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two values differ in index or color; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> values are not equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride left, SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride right);
